6736 common::optional<std::wstring>& mutable_max() override;
6737
6738 void set_max(
6739 common::optional<std::wstring> value
6740 ) override;
6741
6742 // endregion
6743
6744 ~Range() override = default;
6745
6746 private:
6747 common::optional<
6748 std::vector<
6749 std::shared_ptr<IExtension>
6750 >
6751 > extensions_;
6752
6753 common::optional<std::wstring> category_;
6754
6755 common::optional<std::wstring> id_short_;
6756
6757 common::optional<
6758 std::vector<
6759 std::shared_ptr<ILangStringNameType>
6760 >
6761 > display_name_;
6762
6763 common::optional<
6764 std::vector<
6765 std::shared_ptr<ILangStringTextType>
6766 >
6767 > description_;
6768
6769 common::optional<
6770 std::shared_ptr<IReference>
6771 > semantic_id_;
6772
6773 common::optional<
6774 std::vector<
6775 std::shared_ptr<IReference>
6776 >
6777 > supplemental_semantic_ids_;
6778
6779 common::optional<
6780 std::vector<
6781 std::shared_ptr<IQualifier>
6782 >
6783 > qualifiers_;
6784
6785 common::optional<
6786 std::vector<
6787 std::shared_ptr<IEmbeddedDataSpecification>
6788 >
6789 > embedded_data_specifications_;
6790
6791 DataTypeDefXsd value_type_;
6792
6793 common::optional<std::wstring> min_;
6794
6795 common::optional<std::wstring> max_;
6796};

7664 common::optional<std::wstring>& mutable_content_type() override;
7665
7666 void set_content_type(
7667 common::optional<std::wstring> value
7668 ) override;
7669
7670 // endregion
7671
7672 ~File() override = default;
7673
7674 private:
7675 common::optional<
7676 std::vector<
7677 std::shared_ptr<IExtension>
7678 >
7679 > extensions_;
7680
7681 common::optional<std::wstring> category_;
7682
7683 common::optional<std::wstring> id_short_;
7684
7685 common::optional<
7686 std::vector<
7687 std::shared_ptr<ILangStringNameType>
7688 >
7689 > display_name_;
7690
7691 common::optional<
7692 std::vector<
7693 std::shared_ptr<ILangStringTextType>
7694 >
7695 > description_;
7696
7697 common::optional<
7698 std::shared_ptr<IReference>
7699 > semantic_id_;
7700
7701 common::optional<
7702 std::vector<
7703 std::shared_ptr<IReference>
7704 >
7705 > supplemental_semantic_ids_;
7706
7707 common::optional<
7708 std::vector<
7709 std::shared_ptr<IQualifier>
7710 >
7711 > qualifiers_;
7712
7713 common::optional<
7714 std::vector<
7715 std::shared_ptr<IEmbeddedDataSpecification>
7716 >
7717 > embedded_data_specifications_;
7718
7719 common::optional<std::wstring> value_;
7720
7721 common::optional<std::wstring> content_type_;
7722};

8463class EventPayload

8478 std::shared_ptr<IReference>
8479 > subject_id = common::nullopt,

8483 );

8583 void set_time_stamp(
8584 std::wstring value
8585 ) override;
8586
8587 // endregion
8588
8589 // region Get and set payload_
8590
8591 const common::optional<
8592 std::vector<std::uint8_t>
8593 >& payload() const override;
8594
8595 common::optional<
8596 std::vector<std::uint8_t>
8597 >& mutable_payload() override;
8598
8599 void set_payload(
8600 common::optional<
8601 std::vector<std::uint8_t>
8602 > value
8603 ) override;
8604
8605 // endregion
8606
8607 ~EventPayload() override = default;
8608
8609 private:
8610 std::shared_ptr<IReference> source_;
8611
8612 common::optional<
8613 std::shared_ptr<IReference>
8614 > source_semantic_id_;
8615
8616 std::shared_ptr<IReference> observable_reference_;
8617
8618 common::optional<
8619 std::shared_ptr<IReference>
8620 > observable_semantic_id_;
8621
8622 common::optional<std::wstring> topic_;
8623
8624 common::optional<
8625 std::shared_ptr<IReference>
8626 > subject_id_;
8627
8628 std::wstring time_stamp_;
8629
8630 common::optional<
8631 std::vector<std::uint8_t>
8632 > payload_;
8633};
